Review the AGENT INVOCATIONS LOG above to see which phases were skipped.

AGENT INVOCATIONS LOG:

completion_promises.criterion_text: seed module → `seed_module` payload (`module_path`); ADR → `adr` payload carrying `decision` + `status`; review report → `review_report` payload carrying `verdict`; completed-task outcome → `build_outcome` payload (`status`, `duration_seconds`)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented all four parsers: parse_seed_module extracts module_path into SeedModulePayload; parse_adr extracts decision+status into ADRPayload; parse_review_report extracts verdict into ReviewReportPayload; parse_build_outcome extracts status+duration_seconds into BuildOutcomePayload. All tested and verified in test_parsers.py

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each parser sets `project` and `identifier` matching `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$` (hyphens/colons in guardkit IDs normalized to underscores) and a required `source_ref` equal to the source path
completion_promises.evidence: All parsers extract project and identifier from front-matter, normalize them using _normalize_identifier (replaces hyphens and colons with underscores), validate against IDENTIFIER_PATTERN via BasePayload.__init__, and set source_ref to str(doc.path). Tests verify normalization of ADR-SP-007 → ADR_SP_007 and FEAT:MEM:07 → FEAT_MEM_07

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each document kind maps to exactly one canonical `payload_type` (the Scenario Outline mapping)
completion_promises.evidence: Each parser constructs exactly one payload type: parse_seed_module → SeedModulePayload (payload_type='seed_module'), parse_adr → ADRPayload (payload_type='adr'), parse_review_report → ReviewReportPayload (payload_type='review_report'), parse_build_outcome → BuildOutcomePayload (payload_type='build_outcome'). Payload types are ClassVar constants in payload models.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A document carrying exactly the required fields for its type parses into a payload (just-inside boundary)
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_document_with_exact_required_fields_parses verifies a seed_module document with only project, identifier, module_path, and type fields successfully parses into a SeedModulePayload. Pydantic extra='ignore' config allows additional fields to be present without error.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A document missing a required field (e.g. an ADR with no `status`) produces an unparseable result with a reason and **no** payload
completion_promises.evidence: All parsers check for missing required fields and return UnparseableDocument with descriptive reason when any required field is absent. Tests verify missing module_path, decision, status, verdict, and duration_seconds all produce unparseable results. No payload is constructed in these cases.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A document body containing database commands / prompt-injection text is carried **byte-for-byte** into the payload content, and no command in the content is executed during parsing
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_injection_body_carried_verbatim creates a document with SQL injection, shell injection, and template injection patterns in the body. Parser successfully creates payload without executing any content. Content is treated strictly as data - no eval, exec, or template rendering occurs.

Implementation uses only deterministic operations: YAML front-matter extraction with regex, dict.get() for field access, string normalization with replace(), and Pydantic model construction. No LLM imports, no API calls, no ML inference - purely deterministic parsing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `tests/unit/reindex/test_parsers.py` covers each kind, the missing-required-field case, identifier normalization, and the injection round-trip
completion_promises.evidence: Created comprehensive test suite with 16 tests: each kind has success+failure tests (TestSeedModuleParser, TestADRParser, TestReviewReportParser, TestBuildOutcomeParser), TestIdentifierNormalization verifies hyphen and colon conversion, TestInjectionSafety verifies byte-for-byte content preservation, TestMissingRequiredFieldBoundaries covers all missing-field cases.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check and black --check on both src/fleet_memory/reindex/parsers.py and tests/unit/reindex/test_parsers.py. All checks passed with zero errors. Fixed unused imports flagged by ruff during development.
